content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene is a dark, dimly lit area with stone walls, stairs and large flat stones. In the center of the scene, there is a staircase leading upwards to an unseen destination. The stairs are made of stone and have a worn appearance. A faint light can be seen at the top in the distance. To the right of the stairs is a large, wooden box or crate. It is sitting on a platform made of wooden planks.)
